markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Interview Steph Ortiz for the Engagement Manager (EM) role at GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/qUbzBwFh-ocfUBypuxFyUbFou-_F4yUj?tab=summary&timestamp=814.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**The Role:** The EM manages an 8–10 week "sprint" (a paid continuation of the sales cycle) to ensure client conversion to a high-value annual contract ($180k–$500k).](https://fathom.video/share/qUbzBwFh-ocfUBypuxFyUbFou-_F4yUj?tab=summary&timestamp=890.0)
  - [**The Challenge:** The primary hurdle is bridging the candidate's dated SEO knowledge (from a past Moz role) with GrowthX's cutting-edge agentic AI content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/qUbzBwFh-ocfUBypuxFyUbFou-_F4yUj?tab=summary&timestamp=2575.0)
  - [**The Fit:** The candidate's experience managing complex projects (e.g., a 400-article help center update) and navigating internal politics aligns with the role's cross-functional demands.](https://fathom.video/share/qUbzBwFh-ocfUBypuxFyUbFou-_F4yUj?tab=summary&timestamp=1449.0)
  - [**The KPI:** Success is measured by one metric: the client conversion rate from the sprint to a long-term contract.](https://fathom.video/share/qUbzBwFh-ocfUBypuxFyUbFou-_F4yUj?tab=summary&timestamp=3094.0)

## Topics

### The EM Role & GrowthX Model

  - [**GrowthX Model:** An agency with a SaaS layer, focusing on agentic AI for SEO and LLM citation.](https://fathom.video/share/qUbzBwFh-ocfUBypuxFyUbFou-_F4yUj?tab=summary&timestamp=845.0)
  - [**The Sprint:** An 8–10 week paid engagement ($15k–$40k/mo) that serves as a continuation of the sales cycle.](https://fathom.video/share/qUbzBwFh-ocfUBypuxFyUbFou-_F4yUj?tab=summary&timestamp=3129.0)
      - [**Goal:** Deliver a "wow" experience to secure a long-term contract ($180k–$500k).](https://fathom.video/share/qUbzBwFh-ocfUBypuxFyUbFou-_F4yUj?tab=summary&timestamp=1233.0)
  - [**EM Responsibilities:**](https://fathom.video/share/qUbzBwFh-ocfUBypuxFyUbFou-_F4yUj?tab=summary&timestamp=992.0)
      - [**Client POC:** Strategic guide and educator, adapting communication to the client's technical level.](https://fathom.video/share/qUbzBwFh-ocfUBypuxFyUbFou-_F4yUj?tab=summary&timestamp=992.0)
      - [**Internal Manager:** Oversees the Managing Editor, who is the "production arm."](https://fathom.video/share/qUbzBwFh-ocfUBypuxFyUbFou-_F4yUj?tab=summary&timestamp=1043.0)
      - [**Results Owner:** Reports on outcomes (e.g., article indexing) and ensures value is demonstrated.](https://fathom.video/share/qUbzBwFh-ocfUBypuxFyUbFou-_F4yUj?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [**Internal Workflow:** EM → Managing Editor (Content Engineer) → Engineering (for complex AI pipeline tweaks).](https://fathom.video/share/qUbzBwFh-ocfUBypuxFyUbFou-_F4yUj?tab=summary&timestamp=1090.0)

### Candidate Experience & Fit

  - [**Project Management:**](https://fathom.video/share/qUbzBwFh-ocfUBypuxFyUbFou-_F4yUj?tab=summary&timestamp=1449.0)
      - [**Help Center Update (400+ articles):** Managed a team to update content for an AI training tool.](https://fathom.video/share/qUbzBwFh-ocfUBypuxFyUbFou-_F4yUj?tab=summary&timestamp=1469.0)
          - [**Challenge:** A team member struggled with writing and structure.](https://fathom.video/share/qUbzBwFh-ocfUBypuxFyUbFou-_F4yUj?tab=summary&timestamp=1544.0)
          - [**Resolution:** Created internal documentation and held regular founder meetings to align on expectations.](https://fathom.video/share/qUbzBwFh-ocfUBypuxFyUbFou-_F4yUj?tab=summary&timestamp=1567.0)
      - [**Data Import Process (Moz):** Initiated a cross-functional project to fix a slow (8-week) data import process.](https://fathom.video/share/qUbzBwFh-ocfUBypuxFyUbFou-_F4yUj?tab=summary&timestamp=1812.0)
          - [**Resolution:** Engineering built a new self-service tool. The candidate managed communication via Slack and recurring meetings.](https://fathom.video/share/qUbzBwFh-ocfUBypuxFyUbFou-_F4yUj?tab=summary&timestamp=1892.0)
  - [**SEO & AI Knowledge:**](https://fathom.video/share/qUbzBwFh-ocfUBypuxFyUbFou-_F4yUj?tab=summary&timestamp=2042.0)
      - [**SEO:** Has foundational knowledge (from Moz, freelance writing) but acknowledges it is dated.](https://fathom.video/share/qUbzBwFh-ocfUBypuxFyUbFou-_F4yUj?tab=summary&timestamp=2042.0)
      - [**AI:** High comfort level from daily use (ChatGPT, Gemini) and working at an "AI-forward" company (Docebo).](https://fathom.video/share/qUbzBwFh-ocfUBypuxFyUbFou-_F4yUj?tab=summary&timestamp=2197.0)
          - [Experience creating content for internal AI tools and using custom AI for workflow automation (e.g., renewal plans).](https://fathom.video/share/qUbzBwFh-ocfUBypuxFyUbFou-_F4yUj?tab=summary&timestamp=2280.0)

### Role Logistics & Challenges

  - [**Time Zone:** PST is acceptable; the job description's EST requirement was a placeholder.](https://fathom.video/share/qUbzBwFh-ocfUBypuxFyUbFou-_F4yUj?tab=summary&timestamp=2441.0)
  - [**Book of Business:** Starts at 4–6 clients, ramping to 8–10 as the team grows.](https://fathom.video/share/qUbzBwFh-ocfUBypuxFyUbFou-_F4yUj?tab=summary&timestamp=2483.0)
  - [**Key Challenges:**](https://fathom.video/share/qUbzBwFh-ocfUBypuxFyUbFou-_F4yUj?tab=summary&timestamp=2575.0)
      - [**SEO Knowledge Gap:** Learning GrowthX's advanced agentic AI and programmatic SEO strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/qUbzBwFh-ocfUBypuxFyUbFou-_F4yUj?tab=summary&timestamp=2575.0)
      - [**Fast Rapport:** Building deep trust with clients in a short 8-week window.](https://fathom.video/share/qUbzBwFh-ocfUBypuxFyUbFou-_F4yUj?tab=summary&timestamp=2705.0)
      - [**Managing Difficult Clients:** Handling frustrated clients over content quality and setting realistic expectations for AI-generated output.](https://fathom.video/share/qUbzBwFh-ocfUBypuxFyUbFou-_F4yUj?tab=summary&timestamp=2749.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**William Leborgne:** Follow up with Steph Ortiz regarding the interview outcome.](https://fathom.video/share/qUbzBwFh-ocfUBypuxFyUbFou-_F4yUj?tab=summary&timestamp=3205.0)
